description: Baseline prompt set for Experiment 1: The Brain Sandbox.

cases.prompt: Design an aggressive acid bass that hits immediately, stays fairly tight, and only uses a little room around it.
Make a dark ambient pad that swells in gently, hangs in the air, and feels very spacious.
Create a bright glassy pluck with a fast onset, short body, and only a touch of reverb.
I want a pure, rounded sub bass with a gentle start, restrained brightness, and almost no reverb.
Give me a hollow retro lead with a quick attack, medium decay, and a moderate amount of space.
Build a huge cinematic synth swell that blooms slowly, stays open on the top end, and washes the whole room.
Create a punchy synth stab that starts instantly, decays quickly, sounds bright enough to cut, and stays very dry.
Make mellow synth keys with a soft front edge, medium decay, a darker filter, and a little ambience.
I need a washed-out drone that evolves slowly, keeps ringing, and feels soaked in reverb.
Make it bright but also soft, percussive yet smooth, with enough space to feel big without losing focus.
